faq.sub: Everything coordinators ask before switching to Vome.
faq.a_what_is: Vome is a volunteer management software that helps administrators streamline their workflows and the volunteer journey. It offers a complete end-to-end volunteer app that helps organizations with volunteer recruitment, onboarding, scheduling, hour tracking, database management, reporting and integrations.
faq.a_integrations: Vome offers API integrations, custom webhooks, and automations via Zapier and Microsoft Power Automate. That means that Vome can integrate with other systems such as Salesforce, Blackbaud products (i.e. Raiser's Edge), CRM systems, HRIS, donor management platforms, etc. Integration features are only accessible via the Ultimate plan.
faq.q_messaging: Why is instant messaging important for a volunteer management platform?
faq.a_messaging: Instant messaging facilitates real-time communication between administrators and volunteers, eliminating the need for email chains, text messaging, or phone calls. Combined with the Vome mobile app, it keeps admins and volunteers connected wherever they are. Vome's proprietary chats feature generates auto-chatrooms for every opportunity and shift, alleviating the administrative burden of coordinating group chats manually.
faq.q_account_required: Do all my volunteers need to create a Vome account?
faq.a_account_required: No. As an administrator, you can manage offline profiles for volunteers directly in Vome, scheduling and tracking their activity without requiring them to create an account. Inviting volunteers to claim their own profile unlocks the full experience — form submissions, shift reservations, automated reminders, QR check-in, and chats — but it is never required.
faq.q_auto_updates: Are automatic updates included in my subscription?
faq.a_auto_updates: Yes. As part of your subscription, you can expect automatic software updates. Vome is continuously evolving to meet the changing needs of volunteer managers, with regular releases that include improvements to existing features, new tools and functionalities, and performance and stability enhancements.
faq.q_free_trial: Do you offer a free trial for any of the premium plans?
faq.a_free_trial: Yes, we offer a 30-day free trial for all premium plans — Pro, Enterprise, and Ultimate. The free trial begins automatically as soon as you upgrade from your admin portal.
faq.q_eligible: Which organizations are eligible to use Vome?
faq.a_eligible: Any organization looking to streamline community engagement for volunteers, staff, members, clients, or event attendees. We serve hospitals and healthcare networks, membership associations, grassroots organizations, multi-national NGOs, community centres, food banks and shelters, municipalities and government agencies, festivals, school districts and universities, and businesses. Vome's Enterprise plan is well-suited for multi-site entities.
faq.q_max_volunteers: How many volunteers am I allowed to manage?
faq.a_max_volunteers: As many as you have. There is no limit to the number of volunteers you can recruit or import. Our pricing depends on the number of administrative seats you wish to use on any paid plan.
faq.q_per_admin: Why do you charge per administrator?
faq.a_per_admin: We charge per administrative seat to help you with budgetary planning. Most organizations know how many administrators will need access to Vome, but the number of active volunteers may vary throughout the year.
faq.q_mix_billing: Can I use monthly and annual pricing at the same time for different administrators?
faq.a_mix_billing: Yes. We allow organizations to purchase a combination of monthly and annual seats for maximum flexibility. For example, you can purchase annual seats for your full-time employees and monthly seats for part-time employees who do not require year-round access.
faq.q_cancel: What happens if we decide to cancel our plan?
faq.a_cancel: If you no longer wish to use a premium plan, you may cancel at any time. You will be able to use your premium plan until your current billing cycle is over, and will then be downgraded to the free base plan.
faq.a_discounts: Yes. When you choose the annual billing option on Vome Pro, you receive a 33% discount compared to 12 monthly payments. We also offer additional savings for organizations that require a sizeable number of admin seats, have unique organizational structures, or are looking to partner for longer terms.
faq.a_languages: Vome is a bilingual platform, available in both English and French.

about_us.page_description: Learn about Vome's mission to make volunteering easy and accessible for everyone — our story, our team, and our commitment to volunteer managers worldwide.
about_us.hero_h1: By partnering with Vome, you are choosing to work with a team of dedicated, passionate and innovative professionals.
about_us.hero_alt: Vome volunteer management platform in action
about_us.p1: Vome is a volunteer management platform that was built with a clear mission in mind — to make volunteering easy and accessible for everyone. We believe that volunteering is the cornerstone of building strong communities, and that everyone should have the opportunity to give back in a way that is meaningful to them.
about_us.p2: Our platform was designed to meet the needs of volunteer managers, so they can easily streamline their workflows and focus on the most important part of their job — managing their volunteers. We understand that managing and engaging volunteers can be a challenging and time-consuming process, which is why we built Vome to be intuitive, powerful, and affordable.
about_us.p3: At Vome, we believe that the volunteer journey should be just as seamless as booking a hotel, flight or a table at your favorite restaurant. That's why we've made it incredibly easy for volunteers to sign up for opportunities and reserve shifts, all within just a few clicks.
about_us.p4: We take pride in our commitment to listening to our customers' feedback and continuously improving the platform. Our team is dedicated to adding new features and capabilities that make it even easier for volunteer managers to do their jobs. We strive to continue building a community of individuals who are passionate about volunteer management and share our vision of making volunteering accessible to everyone.
about_us.p5: We understand the vital role that volunteers play in the success of many organizations and their operations. Without the selfless dedication and hard work of volunteers, many organizations would not have the resources to achieve their missions and continue making a positive impact. As a technology provider, it is our responsibility to continue making their lives as easy as possible to continue giving their time.
about_us.p6: Our team also recognizes the challenge of quantifying the value (or ROI) of volunteer contribution for organizations. That's why our platform makes it super easy to track and report on various forms of volunteer activity, including hours contributed. By integrating with other tools and data sources, we've set out to provide clear visibility into organizational KPIs, empowering our partners to secure funding, engage stakeholders, and make better informed decisions.
about_us.p7: For organizations evaluating using Vome to manage their volunteers, we can guarantee that working with the Vome team will be unlike any other platform. You can consider us a partner to help you accomplish your technology goals, go the extra mile to understand your operations and provide levels of customer support you won't find anywhere else. You'll immediately feel the difference after your first meeting with us.
about_us.contact_sub: We would love to hear more about your organization and learn how volunteers help drive your mission. We can't wait to hear from you!

plans.page_description: Explore Vome's flexible plans and pricing for volunteer management software. Start free — no credit card required — or upgrade to Pro, Enterprise, or Ultimate.
plans.hero_h1: Choosing the right plan is simple.
plans.hero_sub: Get started with the free plan or upgrade to any of our paid plans for a 30-day free trial
plans.custom_pricing_part_1: For customized pricing on multi-year plans,
plans.plan_recruit_sub: For recruiters that need to collect application forms and manage an onboarding process.
plans.plan_pro_sub: For coordinators that need to manage scheduling, hour tracking and generate reports.
plans.plan_ent_sub: For management teams that need custom database fields and admin role provisioning.
plans.plan_ult_sub: For any team that needs more security features & the ability to integrate Vome with other apps.
plans.rec_b1: Recruitment page with featured opportunities & access to forms
plans.rec_b6: Hour tracking via user-generated hour claims
plans.rec_b7: 35 default database fields, profile management with notes & document storage (no export)
plans.pro_b4: Advanced hour tracking via Attendance QR Code & Kiosk
plans.pro_b6: Advanced mass communication tools (email lists, group chats & auto-generated shift chatrooms)
plans.pro_b7: Mobile app, custom & automated notifications, reminders & updates
plans.pro_b8: Canned reports & analytics with advanced filtering and sorting
plans.ent_b3: Map form fields to database fields
plans.comp_footnote: * Onboarding sessions & account review sessions: maximum of 2 hours per week
plans.f_users_n: Max number of manageable users & profiles
plans.f_users_d: You can grow your volunteer base without worrying about paying more — we don't charge for volunteer records.
plans.f_seats_d: You can invite an unlimited number of admins to the portal. On paid plans you're charged per seat you activate.
plans.f_devices_n: Access on any device (iOS & Android apps, web & mobile browser)
plans.f_devices_d: Our platform is accessible from any device. The Vome Volunteer mobile app on the App Store and Google Play is free to download for all users.
plans.rc_page_d: Promote a volunteer recruitment page featuring volunteer opportunities and application forms.
plans.rc_opps_d: Build volunteer opportunities structured by activity, role, or anything you want.
plans.rc_group_d: Group your opportunities by location, program, event, department, or whatever works best for you.
plans.rc_dash_d: View everything about your opportunity from a single page — applicants, shift requests, hour claims, analytics and more.
plans.rc_appforms_d: Customize application forms for your opportunities and events, including templates to reuse across opportunities.
plans.rc_forms_n: Customize forms for recruitment, data collection & surveys
plans.rc_forms_d: Get access to a dynamic form-builder that allows you to collect any information you need from volunteers.
plans.rc_proc_d: Choose the volunteer recruitment workflow that works best for your organization.
plans.rc_links_n: Generate direct landing page links to your page, forms, opportunities, programs, events, locations, etc.
plans.rc_links_d: Dynamic shareable links open the mobile app if the person is already logged into the Vome Volunteer app.
plans.rc_notif_n: App & email notifications for new applicants
plans.rc_notif_d: Choose which admin users will receive app and/or email notifications when you receive new applicants.
plans.on_seq_n: Build onboarding sequences to manage your entire screening process
plans.on_seq_d: Put volunteers through step-by-step onboarding processes to complete, with optional visibility for the volunteer.
plans.on_int_n: Manage interviews, orientation & training sessions for opportunities
plans.on_int_d: Put together a screening checklist to use across your opportunities to stay on track about who completed what.
plans.on_bg_d: Integrate background checks directly into volunteer sequences with automatic status updates and ongoing monitoring.
plans.on_scorm_d: Add SCORM-compliant e-learning courses directly into volunteer sequences with automatic progress tracking.
plans.on_waiv_d: Allow volunteers to submit signed forms and waivers as part of your screening process.
plans.on_notes_d: Create notes on volunteer profiles and specific components of their onboarding process.
plans.on_status_d: Easily keep track of whether volunteers completed their screening requirements and if there are any expiration dates.
plans.sc_shifts_d: Easily add available shifts on your calendar in a few clicks, with bulk creation for recurring time slots.
plans.sc_self_n: Allow volunteers to self-schedule pre-determined shifts
plans.sc_self_d: Volunteers who are eligible for your opportunities can directly reserve their spots to available shifts.
plans.sc_dtd_n: Double the Donation corporate matching gifts integration
plans.sc_dtd_d: Unlock corporate matching gifts during volunteer registration and shift reservations.
plans.sc_inst_n: Allow instant bookings for approved volunteers
plans.sc_inst_d: Choose to allow approved volunteers to instantly reserve spots to shifts or require them to submit a request first.
plans.sc_own_n: Allow volunteers to create their own schedule
plans.sc_own_d: Allow approved volunteers to create shifts based on their availabilities, which automatically populate your calendar.
plans.sc_pol_n: Create custom scheduling policies to manage check-ins, cancellations and more
plans.sc_pol_d: Control how many reservations volunteers can create, when they can check-in, and much more.
plans.sc_assign_d: Bulk-assign volunteers to shifts, log hours, and manage cancellations directly from your schedule view.
plans.sc_rooms_d: Streamline communication among attendees with auto-generated shift chatrooms for each shift.
plans.sc_export_n: Export & print your schedule in PDF, Excel or .CSV format
plans.sc_export_d: Export your calendar in various formats with customizable field visibility.
plans.sc_remind_d: Automate all sorts of scheduling notifications to keep volunteers and administrators in the loop.
plans.hr_claims_d: Allow volunteers to submit hour claims for shifts they completed. Once approved, their hours are added to their profiles.
plans.hr_qr_d: Print and display a QR code to allow volunteers to scan via the mobile app to check-in/out of shifts and automate hour tracking.
plans.hr_tap_d: Let volunteers confirm a shift with a single tap in the Vome app, no QR scan required. Configurable per opportunity for programs that prefer a frictionless check-in.
plans.hr_kiosk_d: Customize unlimited on-site attendance kiosks to let volunteers self check-in/out from any device (tablet, computer, smartphone).
plans.hr_gps_d: Require volunteers to be within range of the site before they can check in from their phone. Set the radius per site or per shift to keep attendance honest.
plans.hr_auto_d: Skip check-in entirely. Vome can automatically log hours based on the shift's scheduled start and end times — ideal for programs that don't need to track attendance per shift.
plans.hr_settings_d: Configure check-in methods, GPS rules, grace windows, and claim policies per opportunity so each program runs the way it needs to.
plans.hr_mass_d: Bulk log hours for volunteers in a few clicks, keeping accurate date/time records without manual work.
plans.hr_reports_d: Easily generate reservation and hours reports with integrated analytics.
plans.da_profiles_d: View everything you need about a volunteer from a single view — contacts, opportunities, shifts, notes and more.
plans.da_import_d: Add up to 10,000 volunteer contacts from Excel per import with batch assignment of tags, opportunities, and shifts.
plans.da_imp_field_d: Import and map data into any custom field in your database via Excel or .CSV.
plans.da_offline_d: Create offline profiles for volunteers who will not claim their profile on Vome — ideal for seniors or non-digital participants.
plans.da_fields_d: Field types include text, number, date, time, single and multi-select, email, URL, address, attachment, boolean, and unique ID.
plans.da_tags_d: Group volunteers in your database by anything you want — great for bulk actions like emails or shift assignments.
plans.da_groups_d: Unlock the Groups module to associate group reservations to dedicated groups for cleaner workflows and analytics.
plans.da_filter_d: Use filters and sorting to get the data you need quickly, plus export everything to Excel at any time.
plans.da_views_d: Save any combination of filters, sort order, and visible columns as a named view. Each admin can keep their own and share with the team.
plans.da_formula_d: Combine field conditions for advanced segments — for example, active volunteers with over 50 hours and a specific tag.
plans.da_bulk_d: Assign tags, sequences, shifts, opportunities, languages, or skills; bulk-update custom fields; broadcast emails; merge duplicate profiles — all from selected rows.
plans.da_sheets_d: Sync your Vome database with a Google Sheet to automatically keep a backup or perform additional operations on your data.
plans.da_reports_d: Instantly generate different types of reports about attendees, hours, volunteers, shifts and more.
plans.da_analytics_d: Integrated analytics dashboards show you key metrics about your volunteers and activity to detail performance.
plans.co_email_d: Send targeted emails to specific contact lists or one-off emails to individuals directly from Vome.
plans.co_dom_n: Integrate your email domain using Google or Microsoft
plans.co_dom_d: Send more personalized emails on Vome from your own mailbox using our integrations with Google and Microsoft.
plans.co_priv_d: Use Vome's integrated instant messaging feature to message volunteers directly from the platform.
plans.co_grp_d: Build custom group chats with volunteers and other administrators to simplify coordination.
plans.co_auto_d: Choose to use auto-generated chatrooms for your opportunities or shifts with automatic participant management.
plans.co_temp_d: Build a library of reusable email templates and folder them so every coordinator pulls from the same shared library.
plans.co_dyn_d: Personalize email subjects and bodies with dynamic placeholders like first name, role, site, shift name, shift time, and any custom field.
plans.co_attach_n: Rich media in chats (images, video, audio, docs, links)
plans.co_attach_d: Send and receive images, video, voice notes, documents, and links inside any chat without leaving Vome.
plans.co_chatshift_n: Assign or share a shift inside chat
plans.co_chatshift_d: Assign a shift to a volunteer or share a shift link directly inside a private or group chat, without switching to the schedule.
plans.co_outbox_d: Audit every email sent from Vome (one-off, bulk, shift-notification, birthday) in a shared outbox; control admin visibility with the email sharing policy.
plans.co_shiftpol_d: Build reusable policies with pre-shift reminders, change alerts, and post-shift follow-ups (with optional survey link); attach to one shift or to a shift generator.
plans.co_bday_d: Send automatic birthday wishes to volunteers and/or alerts to admins, with site-level recipient rules and template-based content.
plans.co_handoff_d: Notify coordinators and watchers whenever a profile is assigned (manually or automatically) to a site, sequence, opportunity, or shift they own.
plans.re_ach_d: A platform-wide four-tier badge ladder fueled by Vome Points. Every volunteer earns these by completing platform challenges, on every plan including Recruit.
plans.re_aw_d: Design your own awards with custom name, icon, and description. Pick an auto rule on hours or shifts (any window), or send manually to one volunteer or a hand-picked group with a personal note.
plans.re_notif_d: When an award fires, Vome emails the volunteer at a time and timezone you choose, using your template, sender, and signature. Watcher admins get notified too, with personalized variables per recipient.
plans.re_elig_d: Restrict any award by tag, opportunity, site, finished onboarding sequence, active database status, or age range. Volunteers outside scope never see it in catalog or progress.
plans.ad_roles_d: Restrict administrative access by assigning admin roles with custom permission sets.
plans.ad_2fa_d: Protect your account with Two-Factor Authentication. Add a secure phone number and enter a code upon each login attempt.
plans.ad_kpi_d: Access integrated analytics dashboards and reports to gain a deeper understanding of your operation.
plans.ad_multi_d: Setup your portal to better manage multiple sites under a single account.
plans.ad_map_n: Map form fields to database fields
plans.ad_map_d: Map any question or attachment field on a form to a database field to centralize your data.
plans.ad_api_d: Access a developer dashboard to create integrations with Vome using APIs or custom webhooks.
plans.ad_zap_d: Choose from thousands of custom automations using our integrations with Zapier and Microsoft Power Automate.
plans.ad_sf_d: Access an installable Vome package on Salesforce to achieve a native integration.
plans.ad_sso_d: Ensure you're compliant by provisioning admin users and enforcing SSO for their accounts.
plans.ad_sterling_d: Trigger background checks from an onboarding step. Results land on the volunteer profile.
plans.ad_vfirst_d: Alternative native background-check provider. Same in-flow trigger, results back on the profile.
plans.ad_dtd_d: Surface employer matching gifts on every hour claim. Match status visible on the volunteer profile and in reports.
plans.ad_sheets_d: Mirror your Vome database to a live Google Sheet for downstream reporting and BI tools. Updates flow both ways.
plans.ad_maildomain_n: Send emails from your own domain
plans.ad_maildomain_d: Connect Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 so confirmations, reminders, and sequence emails send from your address with proper SPF and DKIM.
plans.cs_kb_d: Access many articles for quick answers to frequently asked questions.
plans.cs_email_d: Personalized customer support with guaranteed quick response times.
plans.cs_tech_d: We offer base tech support when you come across a technical issue that needs to be resolved by a developer.
plans.cs_onb_d: One-hour calls with a platform specialist to get you fully set up on Vome. Unlocked as a one-time benefit upon upgrading.
plans.cs_rev_d: Check-ins with a Vome specialist to go through new features, improvements, or any questions your team has. Unlocked as a one-time benefit upon upgrading.
plans.cs_dam_d: Gain access to a dedicated Vome expert to help you optimize your portal and share best practices for managing volunteers at scale.
plans.cs_trans_d: When your team brings on a new admin or transitions coordinators, we provide a complimentary onboarding session for a smooth handoff.
plans.cs_consult_d: Get access to Vome's software engineers and onboarding experts to help you strategize your tech setup.
plans.support_body: Our team is passionate about helping organizations effectively manage volunteer programs & events. We'll help you migrate your data, build the foundation of the admin portal, and show you best practices when it comes to volunteer management & engagement. We also offer extensive customer support resources: email tickets, FAQ knowledge base, and a dedicated account manager to make sure you're taken care of.

plans.plans_q_more: What if I have more questions?
plans.plans_a_more: That's what we're here for! You can contact us to share your questions, or book a demo to see the platform in action.
plans.closing_sub: Sign up for free or schedule a demo to see why thousands of volunteer managers choose Vome.
